Code.title: Code
Code.description:
Alphanumerical text identifier with upper-case letters and limits on using
special characters or whitespace to separate blocks.

alg.title: Algorithm
alg.description: Algorithm stores the algorithm key that was used to generate the value.

val.title: Value
val.description:
Value contains the Hexadecimal representation of the resulting hash
generated by the algorithm.

Digest.description: Digest defines a structure to hold a digest value including the algorithm used to generate it.

uuid.title: UUID
uuid.description: Unique UUIDv1 identifier for the envelope.

dig.title: Digest
dig.description: Digest of the canonical JSON body.

stamps.title: Stamps
stamps.description:
Seals of approval from other organisations that can only be added to
non-draft envelopes.

links.title: Links
links.description:
Links provide URLs to other resources that are related to this envelope
and unlike stamps can be added even in the draft state.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Set of labels that describe but have no influence on the data.

meta.title: Meta
meta.description: Additional semi-structured information about this envelope.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Any information that may be relevant to other humans about this envelope

Header.description: Header defines the metadata of the body.

Key.title: Key
Key.description: Text identifier to be used instead of a code for a more verbose but readable identifier.

oneOf.title: Format
oneOf.description: Alternative formats of the same document, such as PDF, HTML, or XML.

oneOf.title: Portal
oneOf.description:
Websites that provide access to alternative versions of this document or request
modifications. May also allow access to other or previous business documents.

oneOf.title: Request
oneOf.description: Documents related to requests submitted to other systems.

oneOf.title: Response
oneOf.description: Response documents sent from third party systems often in reply to requests.

oneOf.title: Agreement
oneOf.description: Contracts or agreements related to this document.

oneOf.title: Verification
oneOf.description:
Evidence or verification documents that can be used to validate the authenticity
of this document.

oneOf.title: Attachment
oneOf.description:
General attachments for related information such as spread sheets, letters,
presentations, specifications, etc.

category.title: Category
category.description:
Category helps classify the link according to a fixed list. This is optional
but highly recommended as it helps receivers better understand the purpose
of the link and potentially how it should be presented.

key.description:
Key is a unique identifier for the link within the header and category
if provided.

code.title: Code
code.description: Code used to identify the contents of the link.

title.title: Title
title.description: Title of the resource to use when presenting to users.

description.title: Description
description.description: Description of the resource to use when presenting to users.

mime.title: MIME Type
mime.description:
Expected MIME type of the link's content when the content is a file. Can only
be one of the allowed types defined by EN 16931-1:2017 plus XML itself.

digest.title: Digest
digest.description:
Digest is used to verify the integrity of the destination document
when downloaded from the URL.

meta.title: Metadata
meta.description: Meta contains additional metadata about the link.

Link.description: Link defines a link between this document and another resource.

Meta.description: Meta defines a structure for data about the data being defined.

prv.title: Provider
prv.description: Identity of the agency used to create the stamp usually defined by each region.

val.title: Value
val.description: The serialized stamp value generated for or by the external agency

Stamp.description: Stamp defines an official seal of approval from a third party like a governmental agency or intermediary and should thus be included in any official envelopes.
